Class TupleValueProvider

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.convert.TupleValueProvider
All Implemented Interfaces:
CassandraValueProvider, PropertyValueProvider<CassandraPersistentProperty>
public class TupleValueProvider extends Object implements CassandraValueProvider
CassandraValueProvider to read property values from a TupleValue.
Since:
3.0
Author:
Mark Paluch

    Description
    TupleValueProvider(com.datastax.oss.driver.api.core.data.TupleValue tupleValue, ValueExpressionEvaluator evaluator)
    Create a new TupleValueProvider with the given TupleValue and ValueExpressionEvaluator.

    • TupleValueProvider

      public TupleValueProvider(com.datastax.oss.driver.api.core.data.TupleValue tupleValue, ValueExpressionEvaluator evaluator)
      Create a new TupleValueProvider with the given TupleValue and ValueExpressionEvaluator.
      Parameters:
      tupleValue - must not be null.
      evaluator - must not be null.

      public boolean hasProperty(CassandraPersistentProperty property)
      Description copied from interface: CassandraValueProvider
      Returns whether the underlying source contains a data source for the given CassandraPersistentProperty.

      hasProperty in interface CassandraValueProvider
      Parameters:
      property - must not be null.
      Returns:
      true if the underlying source contains a data source for the given CassandraPersistentProperty.

      public Object getSource()
      Description copied from interface: CassandraValueProvider
      Returns whether the underlying source.
